silhouette_language: Classical Greek architecture and artefacts: tall fluted marble columns with a square plinth base and a carved capital, dark aged wood, cast bronze fittings, polished stone game pieces — clean carved ancient forms.
vision_style_brief: An ancient Greek game set under warm Mediterranean daylight: weathered warm-ivory marble with thin grey/gold veining, near-black centuries-old oiled wood, aged bronze with worn bright edges and restrained verdigris in recesses, polished ivory-marble and black-basalt stone pieces. Monumental, ancient, tactile. NOT: shiny plastic, modern tournament equipment, saturated colours, sci-fi or fantasy-glowing materials.
anti_style: modern tournament/product styling (felt, lacquered plastic frames)
saturated or coloured stone (marble must read white/grey, basalt near-black)
sci-fi or fantasy-glowing materials (aged bronze fittings are allowed and must read as bronze, not chrome or gold-plating)
